text: 🇮🇷 Iran’s FM spox Esmaeil Baqaei: There has been no talk about extending the ceasefire. All of Iran's focus has been on creating the necessary conditions for a complete end to the war, considering the rights of the Iranian nation.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：目前没有关于延长停火的讨论。考虑到伊朗民族的权利，伊朗的所有重点都放在为彻底结束战争创造必要条件上。

text: Open Source Intel President Trump has ruled out any financial payments to Iran as part of a nuclear deal. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045187661745250794/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：特朗普总统已排除将向伊朗支付任何财政款项作为核协议的一部分。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045187661745250794/video/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz A new order indeed, if international trade routes can be more durably altered to increase the leverage of a single country. IRGC NAVY COMMAND: A NEW ORDER HAS BEEN IMPOSED ON THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ 1. CIVILIAN VESSELS ARE PERMITTED TO TRANSIT SOLELY THROUGH IRAN'S DESIGNATED ROUTE. 2. TRANSIT OF MILITARY VESSELS THROUGH THE STRAIT REMAINS PROHIBITED. 3. ALL TRANSITS REQUIRE PERMISSION FROM THE IRGC NAVY. 4. THIS TRANSIT IS IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE AGREEMENT FOR THE PERIOD OF SILENCE ON THE BATTLEFIELD AND FOLLOWS THE IMPLEMENTATION OF THE LEBANON CEASEFIRE. - First Squawk tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨：如果国际贸易路线能够更持久地改变以增加单一国家的杠杆作用，那确实是一个新的秩序。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军司令部：霍尔木兹海峡已实施新秩序。1. 民用船只仅允许通过伊朗指定的航线通行。2. 军用船只通过海峡仍然被禁止。3. 所有通行均需获得伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军的许可。4. 此通行符合战场静默期协议，并遵循黎巴嫩停火协议的实施。- First Squawk 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF reveals Operation "Eagle": special unit forces landed in the heart of the Christophani Ridge in southern Lebanon minutes before the ceasefire took effect. The operation was approved by the Chief of Staff and commanded by the IAF commander and Northern Command chief. The IDF says it remains on immediate alert and will continue to remove threats between the border and the ceasefire line. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军披露“鹰”行动：特种部队在停火生效前几分钟降落在黎巴嫩南部克里斯托法尼山脊中心地带。该行动由总参谋长批准，并由以色列空军司令和北方司令部司令指挥。以色列国防军表示，其仍处于即时戒备状态，并将继续清除边境与停火线之间的威胁。推文

text: OSINTdefender Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has announced a loosening of restrictions set on vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz in response to the ceasefire in Lebanon, with the following rules now in effect: 1. Civilian vessels are permitted to transit solely through Iran's designated route. 2. Transit of military vessels through the strait remains prohibited. 3. All transits require permission from the IRGC Navy. 4. This transit is in accordance with the agreement for the period of silence on the battlefield and follows the implementation of the Lebanon ceasefire. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）宣布放宽对通过霍尔木兹海峡船只的限制，以响应黎巴嫩停火协议，现行规则如下：1. 民用船只仅允许通过伊朗指定的航线通行。2. 军用船只通过海峡仍然被禁止。3. 所有通行均需获得伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军的许可。4. 此通行符合战场静默期协议，并遵循黎巴嫩停火协议的实施。推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump told Axios that American and Iranian negotiators will probably meet this weekend in Islamabad, and that he expects them to hammer out a final deal to end the Iran War. “The Iranians want to meet. They want to make a deal. I think a meeting will probably take place over the weekend. I think we will get a deal in the next day or two,” Trump said in a brief phone interview with Barak Ravid. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普告诉Axios，美国和伊朗的谈判代表可能会在本周末在伊斯兰堡会面，他预计他们将敲定一项结束伊朗战争的最终协议。特朗普在与巴拉克·拉维德的简短电话采访中说：“伊朗人想见面。他们想达成协议。我认为会议可能会在周末举行。我认为我们会在一两天内达成协议。”推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Israeli military has revealed Operation “Eit” (Eagle), in which special forces (Shaldag unit) landed in the Cristofani ridge in southern Lebanon minutes before the ceasefire took effect. The operation was approved by the chief of staff and commanded…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Army Radio: The Cristofani ridge in southern Lebanon, captured by Israeli forces minutes before the ceasefire took effect, lies 12 kilometres north of the Israeli Hermon and at the foot of the Syrian Hermon – also under Israeli control. The ridge overlooks the Bekaa valley, 30 kilometres from the Beirut‑Damascus highway, and was the site of a battle against Syrian troops during the First Lebanon War. The force now holding the isolated ridge, with few Lebanese villages around it, is from the elite Shaldag unit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列军方披露了‘鹰’（Eit）行动，特种部队（Shaldag部队）在停火生效前几分钟降落在黎巴嫩南部的克里斯托法尼山脊。该行动由总参谋长批准并由……指挥” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列陆军电台：在停火生效前几分钟被以色列军队占领的黎巴嫩南部克里斯托法尼山脊，位于以色列赫尔蒙山以北12公里处，处于叙利亚赫尔蒙山脚下——该地区也处于以色列控制之下。该山脊俯瞰贝卡谷地，距离贝鲁特-大马士革高速公路30公里，是第一次黎巴嫩战争期间与叙利亚军队作战的地点。目前驻守在这个孤立山脊（周围几乎没有黎巴嫩村庄）的部队来自精锐的Shaldag部队。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel IDF airstrikes on Iranian aircrafts and airfields during the operation Roaring Lion. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045181925682299280/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军在“咆哮狮子”行动期间对伊朗飞机和机场进行的空袭。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045181925682299280/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF strikes on Iranian naval assets during Operation Roaring Lion. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045180978721599545/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军在“咆哮狮子”行动期间对伊朗海军资产的打击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045180978721599545/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan : The United States and Iran are on the verge of signing a memorandum of understanding that would limit uranium enrichment and remove enriched uranium from Iranian soil. A draft has been sent to Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei. The U.S. hopes to hold a decisive meeting on Sunday or Monday. U.S. President Trump, Iranian President Pezeshkian and Foreign Minister Araghchi are keen to reach a deal, despite opposition from the IRGC. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan：美国和伊朗即将签署一份谅解备忘录，该备忘录将限制铀浓缩并从伊朗领土上移除浓缩铀。草案已发送给伊朗最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊。美国希望在周日或周一举行决定性会议。尽管受到伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的反对，美国总统特朗普、伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬和外交部长阿拉格希仍渴望达成协议。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇧🇫🇷🇮🇷British Prime Minister Starmer on the second objective of the mission to the Strait of Hormuz: "Second, that we need to manage the economic shock by avoiding unnecessary trade restrictions, supporting energy and food security, and supporting industries…" ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 British Prime Minister Starmer on the third objective of the joint plan to the Strait of Hormuz: "Thirdly and crucially, we agreed to accelerate our military planning. I can confirm that along with France, The UK will lead a multinational mission to protect freedom of navigation as soon as conditions allow. This will be strictly peaceful and defensive as a mission to reassure commercial shipping and support mine clearance." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇬🇧🇫🇷🇮🇷 英国首相斯塔默谈到霍尔木兹海峡任务的第二个目标：‘第二，我们需要通过避免不必要的贸易限制、支持能源和粮食安全以及支持工业来管理经济冲击……’” ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 英国首相斯塔默谈到霍尔木兹海峡联合计划的第三个目标：“第三，也是至关重要的一点，我们同意加快军事规划。我可以确认，英国将与法国一道，在条件允许的情况下领导一项多国任务，以保护航行自由。这将是一项严格的和平与防御性任务，旨在让商业航运放心并支持扫雷工作。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇧🇫🇷🇮🇷British Prime Minister Starmer on the first objective of the joint plan with France to ensure freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz: "And there are a number of elements. First, to deliver the diplomatic push for peace based on the fundamental…" ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 British Prime Minister Starmer on the second objective of the mission to the Strait of Hormuz: "Second, that we need to manage the economic shock by avoiding unnecessary trade restrictions, supporting energy and food security, and supporting industries so that shipping can resume as soon as conditions permit." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇬🇧🇫🇷🇮🇷英国首相斯塔默谈及与法国联合计划的首要目标，即确保霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由：‘有几个要素。首先，基于基本原则推动外交和平……’” ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 英国首相斯塔默谈及霍尔木兹海峡任务的第二个目标：“其次，我们需要通过避免不必要的贸易限制、支持能源和粮食安全以及支持相关行业来应对经济冲击，以便在条件允许时尽快恢复航运。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iran’s FM spox Esmaeil Baqaei: The naval blockade by the United States is considered a violation of the ceasefire, and Iran will take the necessary reciprocal action.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：美国的封锁被视为违反停火协议，伊朗将采取必要的对等行动。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇧🇫🇷🇮🇷British Prime Minister Starmer believes that the announcement of the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz reinforces the work they have been doing putting together a joint plan with France. "We welcome the announcement that was made during our meeting…" ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 British Prime Minister Starmer on the first objective of the joint plan with France to ensure freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz: "And there are a number of elements. First, to deliver the diplomatic push for peace based on the fundamental principle that the strait should be reopened immediately with no tolls and no restrictions. And there was absolute unity on those points across all of the states attending today. And that transcends the other differences that countries who were with us this afternoon may have because the whole world needs to see a solution here." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇬🇧🇫🇷🇮🇷英国首相斯塔默认为，宣布重新开放霍尔木兹海峡加强了他们与法国共同制定联合计划的工作。‘我们欢迎在会议期间宣布的消息……’” ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 英国首相斯塔默谈及与法国联合计划的首要目标，即确保霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由：“有几个要素。首先，基于海峡应立即重新开放、不收过路费且无限制的基本原则，推动外交和平。今天出席的所有国家在这些点上达成了绝对共识。这超越了今天下午与我们在一起的国家可能存在的其他分歧，因为全世界都需要看到这里的解决方案。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iran’s FM spox Esmaeil Baqaei: Iran pursued that the ceasefire in Lebanon also be based on the April 8 understanding; the ceasefire happened last night. A great deal of effort was made from various sides for this matter. Therefore, it was decided that the part related to Iran's commitments - which I emphasize again is nothing new and is the implementation of the same April 8 commitment - be carried out. That is, the movement of commercial vessels with Iran's coordination. Araghchi's tweet was within the framework of the April 8 ceasefire agreement. Media and people should not pay attention to the opposing side's media game. They have contradictory positions. Iran is the guardian of the Strait of Hormuz and wherever necessary, in implementing measures that guarantee the interests and rights of the Iranian nation, it shows no leniency. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：伊朗一直寻求黎巴嫩停火也基于4月8日的谅解；停火已于昨晚实现。各方为此付出了巨大努力。因此，决定履行与伊朗承诺相关的部分——我再次强调，这并非新事物，而是4月8日承诺的落实——即在伊朗协调下进行商船通行。阿拉格齐的推文是在4月8日停火协议框架内的。媒体和民众不应关注对方的媒体游戏。他们的立场是矛盾的。伊朗是霍尔木兹海峡的守护者，在实施保障伊朗民族利益和权利的措施时，无论何时何地，都不会手软。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Iran’s FM spox Esmaeil Baqaei: If the other side intends to breach the agreement, which apparently it wants to do, and if the naval blockade continues, the Islamic Republic of Iran will reciprocally take the necessary measures, and there is no doubt about this.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：如果对方打算违反协议（显然他们想这样做），且如果海上封锁继续，伊朗伊斯兰共和国将采取必要的对等措施，这一点毫无疑问。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 Iran’s FM spox Esmaeil Baqaei: Araghchi's tweet was within the framework of the April 8 ceasefire agreement." 🇮🇷 Iran’s FM spox Esmaeil Baqaei: Media and people should not pay attention to the opposing side's media game. They have contradictory positions. Iran is the guardian of the Strait of Hormuz and wherever necessary, in implementing measures that guarantee the interests and rights of the Iranian nation, it shows no leniency.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：阿拉格齐的推文是在4月8日停火协议框架内的。” 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：媒体和民众不应关注对方的媒体游戏。他们的立场是矛盾的。伊朗是霍尔木兹海峡的守护者，在实施保障伊朗民族利益和权利的措施时，无论何时何地，都不会手软。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇧🇫🇷🇮🇷British Prime Minister Starmer welcomed the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz to commercial vessels. He added that today Britain and France have announced their joint plan to ensure freedom of navigation in the Strait alongside international partners.…" ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 British Prime Minister Starmer believes that the announcement of the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz reinforces the work they have been doing putting together a joint plan with France. "We welcome the announcement that was made during our meeting, but we need to make sure that that is both lasting and a workable proposal. And if anything, it reinforces the need for the work that we've been doing this afternoon because we're very clear that the mission that we're putting together is a defensive mission that comes after a ceasefire." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇬🇧🇫🇷🇮🇷英国首相斯塔默欢迎霍尔木兹海峡对商船重新开放。他补充说，今天英国和法国已宣布与国际伙伴共同确保海峡航行自由的联合计划……” ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 英国首相斯塔默认为，宣布重新开放霍尔木兹海峡加强了他们与法国共同制定联合计划的工作。“我们欢迎在会议期间宣布的消息，但我们需要确保这是一个持久且可行的提议。如果说有什么不同的话，它加强了我们今天下午所做工作的必要性，因为我们非常明确，我们正在制定的任务是一项在停火之后进行的防御性任务。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 Iran’s FM spox Esmaeil Baqaei: Iran pursued that the ceasefire in Lebanon also be based on the April 8 understanding; the ceasefire happened last night. A great deal of effort was made from various sides for this matter. Therefore, it was decided that the…" 🇮🇷 Iran’s FM spox Esmaeil Baqaei: Araghchi's tweet was within the framework of the April 8 ceasefire agreement.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：伊朗一直寻求黎巴嫩停火也基于4月8日的谅解；停火已于昨晚实现。各方为此付出了巨大努力。因此，决定……” 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：阿拉格齐的推文是在4月8日停火协议框架内的。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 🇱🇧 During the Lebanon ceasefire, commercial vessel passage through the Strait of Hormuz is fully open via Iran’s designated route. — Iran’s FM Araghchi" 🇮🇷 Iran’s FM spox Esmaeil Baqaei: Iran pursued that the ceasefire in Lebanon also be based on the April 8 understanding; the ceasefire happened last night. A great deal of effort was made from various sides for this matter. Therefore, it was decided that the part related to Iran's commitments - which I emphasize again is nothing new and is the implementation of the same April 8 commitment - be carried out. That is, the movement of commercial vessels with Iran's coordination.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷 🇱🇧 在黎巴嫩停火期间，商船通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道通过伊朗指定的路线完全开放。——伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐” 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：伊朗一直寻求黎巴嫩停火也基于4月8日的谅解；停火已于昨晚实现。各方为此付出了巨大努力。因此，决定履行与伊朗承诺相关的部分——我再次强调，这并非新事物，而是4月8日承诺的落实——即在伊朗协调下进行商船通行。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇧🇾💬🇭🇺Why did Orban lose? It means there were serious flaws in his domestic policy — President Lukashenko 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇧🇾 🇺🇸 "In America every four years a new person comes to power, but politically nothing changes. The same course, the same problems, the same discussions. So maybe you have dictatorship inside the country?" Lukashenko says the USA only talks about democracy and human rights, but its actions say otherwise. US policy in Venezuela, threats to Cuba, and the war in the Middle East show that they are the real dictators. He cites the Minab tragedy saying the USA bombed a school where children and teachers died, almost 200 people. He asks, how many died because the USA encouraged Israel's bombings? "You killed a person — what rights does he have? He's dead." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇧🇾💬🇭🇺欧尔班为什么会输？这意味着他的国内政策存在严重缺陷——卢卡申科总统 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇧🇾 🇺🇸 “在美国，每四年就会有一个新人上台，但在政治上什么都没有改变。同样的路线，同样的问题，同样的讨论。那么，也许你们国内存在独裁统治？” 卢卡申科表示，美国只谈论民主和人权，但其行动却恰恰相反。美国在委内瑞拉的政策、对古巴的威胁以及中东战争表明他们才是真正的独裁者。他引用米纳布悲剧称，美国轰炸了一所学校，导致儿童和教师死亡，近200人丧生。他问道，有多少人因为美国鼓励以色列的轰炸而死亡？“你杀了一个人——他还有什么权利？他已经死了。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 A new order has been imposed on the Strait of Hormuz — Commander of the IRGC Navy.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 霍尔木兹海峡已被实施新秩序 —— 伊斯兰革命卫队海军司令。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military has revealed Operation “Eit” (Eagle), in which special forces (Shaldag unit) landed in the Cristofani ridge in southern Lebanon minutes before the ceasefire took effect. The operation was approved by the chief of staff and commanded by the air force and northern command chiefs. The IDF remains on immediate alert and will continue to remove threats in the area between the border and the ceasefire line. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方披露了“鹰”（Eit）行动，特种部队（Shaldag部队）在停火协议生效前几分钟降落在黎巴嫩南部的克里斯托法尼山脊。该行动由参谋长批准，并由空军和北方司令部指挥官指挥。以色列国防军仍处于紧急戒备状态，并将继续清除边境与停火线之间区域的威胁。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Compilation of IDF airstrikes on Iranian air defense systems. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045179364644376620/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 以色列国防军对伊朗防空系统进行空袭的开源情报汇编。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045179364644376620/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Zelensky says Russia is trying to pull Belarus into the war as occupiers regroup to cover manpower gaps. Ukrainian intel reports road building and artillery positions near the border, and Kyiv has warned Belarus' leadership that Ukraine will defend its land. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 泽连斯基表示，随着占领者重新集结以填补人力缺口，俄罗斯正试图将白俄罗斯拖入战争。乌克兰情报部门报告称，边境附近出现了道路建设和炮兵阵地，基辅已警告白俄罗斯领导层，乌克兰将保卫自己的领土。 推文

text: U.S. Central Command An F/A-18E Super Hornet taxis on the flight deck of Nimitz-class aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) as it sails alongside the USS Delbert D. Black (DDG 119), April 16. Over 10,000 U.S. Sailors, Marines, and Airmen are enforcing the blockade against ships attempting to enter or depart Iranian ports and coastal areas. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 4月16日，一架F/A-18E“超级大黄蜂”战斗机在尼米兹级航空母舰“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号（CVN 72）的飞行甲板上滑行，该航母正与“德尔伯特·D·布莱克”号驱逐舰（DDG 119）并排航行。超过10,000名美国水兵、海军陆战队员和空军人员正在执行封锁任务，阻止船只进入或离开伊朗港口及沿海地区。 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @staunovo : Despite Iran’s announcement Friday that the Strait of Hormuz is open, commercial shippers were waiting for clarity and security guarantees. Shipowners and the oil industry have said they will wait for clear assurances from Iran that it won’t attack ships before resuming normal traffic through the strait, which prior to the war was about 130 ships a day. https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-war-us-talks-2026/card/shippers-waiting-for-clarity-before-sending-tankers-through-strait-e08t2BnJ0YYWQWEVoBa6 tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @staunovo ：尽管伊朗周五宣布霍尔木兹海峡已开放，但商业航运公司仍在等待明确的信号和安全保障。船东和石油行业表示，在恢复通过该海峡的正常航行之前，他们将等待伊朗明确保证不会攻击船只。战前该海峡每天约有130艘船只通行。 https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-war-us-talks-2026/card/shippers-waiting-for-clarity-before-sending-tankers-through-strait-e08t2BnJ0YYWQWEVoBa6 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @bayraktar_1love : MiG-29 intercepts Russian jet-powered Shahed over Odesa region https://twitter.com/bayraktar_1love/status/2045173793430098069/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @bayraktar_1love ：米格-29在敖德萨地区拦截俄罗斯喷气式“沙赫德”无人机 https://twitter.com/bayraktar_1love/status/2045173793430098069/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The crew of a Ukrainian Yak-52 piston-engine trainer aircraft intercepting Russian Shahed/Geran-type long-range strike drones and reconnaissance UAVs over Odesa Oblast in southern Ukraine. The UAVs are engaged by the crew-member carrying an automatic rifle, sitting behind the pilot. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）乌克兰雅克-52活塞式教练机的机组人员在乌克兰南部敖德萨州上空拦截俄罗斯“沙赫德/天竺葵”型远程打击无人机和侦察无人机。坐在飞行员身后的机组成员使用自动步枪对无人机进行攻击。 推文

text: Nuno Felix https://x.com/MagellanQuest/status/2045166883477786673/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix https://x.com/MagellanQuest/status/2045166883477786673/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A look at Iran's ballistic missile production array and its current operational capability. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045176858153533528/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 关于伊朗弹道导弹生产阵列及其当前作战能力的概览。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045176858153533528/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender During a phone interview earlier with Bloomberg, U.S. President Donald J. Trump said that Iran has agreed to suspend its nuclear program indefinitely, and that it will not receive any frozen funds from the United States, adding that talks over a lasting agreement will “probably” be held this weekend in Islamabad. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在早些时候接受彭博社电话采访时，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普表示，伊朗已同意无限期暂停其核计划，并且不会从美国获得任何冻结资金，并补充说关于达成持久协议的谈判“可能”会在本周末在伊斯兰堡举行。 推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - U.S. officials inform some European countries that some previously purchased weapons deliveries are likely to be delayed ‌as the Iran war continues to draw on U.S. weapons stocks — Reuters tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 —— 美国官员通知一些欧洲国家，由于伊朗战争持续消耗美国的武器库存，一些先前购买的武器交付可能会被推迟 —— 路透社 推文

text: WarTranslated Ukrainian troops filmed a guided Gerbera botching a strike on a mobile air defense team. It fell a meter from a Ukrainian vehicle and didn’t detonate, reason unclear. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045174530721579275/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰军队拍摄到一架制导“天竺葵”无人机对移动防空小组的打击失败。它落在距离乌克兰车辆一米远的地方，但没有爆炸，原因不明。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045174530721579275/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's President Pezeshkian spotted cycling with government officials in Isfahan. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045174432310677564/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬被发现与政府官员在伊斯法罕骑自行车。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045174432310677564/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Wall Street Journal: The United States has proposed giving Iran access to $20 billion if it hands over its stockpile of 972 pounds of near‑weapons‑grade enriched uranium. It was not immediately clear whether the offer would include all of Iran’s fissile…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters : U.S. President Trump said the United States will work with Iran to recover enriched uranium and bring it back to the US “at a nice leisurely pace." He denied a $20 billion cash‑for‑uranium deal as “totally false. No money is changing hands.” The US will maintain its naval blockade until an agreement is finalised. Trump expects a deal “very quickly” and said more talks will take place “probably over the weekend”, adding he “might” go to Islamabad once a deal is made. He also said the U.S. is working with Iran to remove mines from the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 华尔街日报：美国提议，如果伊朗交出其972磅近乎武器级浓缩铀的库存，将允许其获得200亿美元。目前尚不清楚该提议是否包括伊朗所有的裂变材料……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：美国总统特朗普表示，美国将与伊朗合作回收浓缩铀，并以“一种从容不迫的速度”将其运回美国。他否认了200亿美元现金换铀的交易，称其为“完全虚假。没有资金易手。”在协议最终敲定之前，美国将维持海军封锁。特朗普预计协议会“很快”达成，并表示更多谈判将“可能在周末”进行，并补充说一旦达成协议，他“可能”会前往伊斯兰堡。他还表示，美国正在与伊朗合作清除霍尔木兹海峡的水雷。 @wfwitness

text: وَلَن تَسقُط لَنَا رَايَة... جودة عالية
text_zh: 我们的旗帜永不倒下... 高清

text: Trump says a deal would “make Israel safe” and that “Israel is going to come out great.” At the same time, he’s pushing to end Israeli strikes on Lebanon: “Israel has to stop. They can't continue to blow buildings up. I am not gonna allow it.” Source: Axios
text_zh: 特朗普表示，一项协议将“使以色列安全”，并称“以色列将会表现得很好”。与此同时，他正在推动结束以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击：“以色列必须停止。他们不能继续炸毁建筑物。我不会允许这种情况发生。” 来源：Axios

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 Rep. Troy Nehls (R-Texas): ‘I think Donald Trump is almost the second coming of Jesus Christ, in my humble opinion’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 美国众议员特洛伊·内尔斯（德克萨斯州共和党人）：‘以我拙见，我认为唐纳德·特朗普几乎是耶稣基督的再临’ @Middle_East_Spectator

text: — 🇸🇾 / 🇮🇱 Syrian President, Ahmad Al-Sharaa: ‘Any country's recognition of Israel's claim to the occupied Golan Heights is invalid and illegal because this is a right belonging to the Syrian people. The Golan is Syrian land. It is not for any state to give away or recognize. More than 134 countries from around the world recognize that the Golan Heights are unequivocally Syrian territory, occupied by Israel.’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇸🇾 / 🇮🇱 叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉：‘任何国家承认以色列对被占领的戈兰高地的主权主张都是无效且非法的，因为这是属于叙利亚人民的权利。戈兰是叙利亚的土地。任何国家都无权将其赠予或承认。世界上有超过134个国家承认戈兰高地明确属于叙利亚领土，目前被以色列占领。’ @Middle_East_Spectator

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷Bloomberg: U.S. President Trump said Iran has agreed to suspend its nuclear programme indefinitely and will not receive any frozen U.S. funds, adding that a broader deal to end the war is largely complete with key points finalizing a permanent peace…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Wall Street Journal: The United States has proposed giving Iran access to $20 billion if it hands over its stockpile of 972 pounds of near‑weapons‑grade enriched uranium. It was not immediately clear whether the offer would include all of Iran’s fissile material, which also includes medium‑ and low‑enriched uranium. Iran has neither dismissed nor accepted the proposal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷彭博社：美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗已同意无限期暂停其核计划，且不会收到任何被冻结的美国资金，并补充说，结束战争的更广泛协议已基本完成，关键点在于敲定永久和平……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：美国提议，如果伊朗交出其972磅近武器级浓缩铀库存，将允许其动用200亿美元资金。目前尚不清楚该提议是否包括伊朗所有的裂变材料，其中包括中低浓缩铀。伊朗既未拒绝也未接受该提议。 @wfwitness

text: Trump told Axios he expects a U.S.–Iran deal “in the next day or two”, with talks likely this weekend: “The Iranians want to meet… I think we will get a deal in the next day or two.”
text_zh: 特朗普告诉Axios，他预计美伊协议将在“这一两天内”达成，会谈可能在本周末进行：“伊朗人想见面……我认为我们会在这一两天内达成协议。”

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇮🇱🇱🇧 Axios: U.S. President Trump told Axios that he expects a final deal with Iran to end the war “in a day or two”, with a meeting likely this weekend. “The Iranians want to meet. They want to make a deal,” he said. Under the emerging memorandum…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: U.S. President Trump said Iran has agreed to suspend its nuclear programme indefinitely and will not receive any frozen U.S. funds, adding that a broader deal to end the war is largely complete with key points finalizing a permanent peace deal "probably" taking place this weekend. U.S. President Trump responded to a question on if the Iranian nuclear program will completely halt with "no years, unlimited." Trump also said he is considering sending U.S. Vice President Vance, Jared Kushner, and Special Envoy Witkoff to lead negotiations, and did not rule out travelling himself. Despite signalling progress, Trump indicated that the U.S. blockade on vessels entering or leaving Iranian ports will remain in place until a final agreement is fully secured, while Iran has warned it could close the strait again if the blockade continues. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇮🇱🇱🇧 Axios：美国总统特朗普告诉Axios，他预计与伊朗达成结束战争的最终协议将在‘一两天内’完成，会谈可能在本周末进行。他说：‘伊朗人想见面。他们想达成协议。’ 根据正在形成的备忘录……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 彭博社：美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗已同意无限期暂停其核计划，且不会收到任何被冻结的美国资金，并补充说，结束战争的更广泛协议已基本完成，敲定永久和平协议的关键点“可能”在本周末进行。当被问及伊朗核计划是否会完全停止时，美国总统特朗普回答说“没有年限，无限期”。特朗普还表示，他正在考虑派遣美国副总统万斯、贾里德·库什纳和特使威特科夫领导谈判，并不排除亲自前往的可能性。尽管释放了进展信号，但特朗普表示，在最终协议完全落实之前，美国对进出伊朗港口的船只的封锁将继续存在，而伊朗则警告称，如果封锁继续，它可能会再次关闭海峡。 @wfwitness

text: 🇪🇺 European leaders backed a plan to deploy naval forces to the Persian Gulf to “protect” shipping, even after the route reopened. Emmanuel Macron pushed for a European-led mission without the U.S., while Friedrich Merz argued Washington should be involved. Keir Starmer called for a lasting arrangement to keep trade flowing. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇺 欧洲领导人支持一项向波斯湾部署海军力量以“保护”航运的计划，即使在航线重新开放之后也是如此。埃马纽埃尔·马克龙推动了一项没有美国参与的欧洲主导的任务，而弗里德里希·默茨则主张华盛顿应该参与其中。基尔·斯塔默呼吁达成一项持久安排以保持贸易畅通。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: {وَكَأَيِّن مِّن نَّبِيٍّ قَاتَلَ مَعَهُ رِبِّيُّونَ كَثِيرٌ فَمَا وَهَنُوا لِمَا أَصَابَهُمْ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ وَمَا ضَعُفُوا وَمَا اسْتَكَانُوا وَاللَّهُ يُحِبُّ الصَّابِرِينَ} - صَدَقَ الله العَليّ العَظِيم
text_zh: {有多少先知曾带领众多信士作战，他们并未因在主道上所遭受的磨难而气馁、软弱或屈服。真主喜爱坚忍的人。} - 真主至大，至高无上

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Iranian source to Al-Araby Al-Jadeed: Trump's claim about the delivery of Iran's enriched uranium is baseless - Only civilian ships, and only through routes specified by Iran, can pass through the Strait of Hormuz. The announcement of the temporary reopening of the Strait of Hormuz has no connection to the current negotiations with Washington. - We waited several hours to ensure that the ceasefire in Lebanon was established; after that, we temporarily reopened the Strait of Hormuz. The announcement of the temporary reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and the ceasefire in Lebanon are part of the agreement. - Negotiations on disputed issues with the US are still ongoing but have no clear outlook due to Washington's excessive demands. - Washington's demands in the negotiations remain illogical and unreasonable. The US president's claim about obtaining Iran's enriched uranium is baseless.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗消息人士向《新阿拉伯人报》透露：特朗普关于移交伊朗浓缩铀的说法毫无根据 - 只有民用船只，且只能通过伊朗指定的航线，才能通过霍尔木兹海峡。宣布暂时重新开放霍尔木兹海峡与目前与华盛顿的谈判无关。 - 我们等待了几个小时以确保黎巴嫩停火得以建立；此后，我们暂时重新开放了霍尔木兹海峡。宣布暂时重新开放霍尔木兹海峡和黎巴嫩停火是协议的一部分。 - 与美国就争议问题的谈判仍在进行中，但由于华盛顿的过分要求，目前没有明确的前景。 - 华盛顿在谈判中的要求仍然是不合逻辑和不合理的。美国总统关于获得伊朗浓缩铀的说法毫无根据。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇧🇫🇷🇮🇷British Prime Minister Starmer welcomed the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz to commercial vessels. He added that today Britain and France have announced their joint plan to ensure freedom of navigation in the Strait alongside international partners.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Fars News Agency: An informed source close to the negotiations revealed that under the two‑week ceasefire, Iran had agreed to allow a daily number of ships to transit the Strait of Hormuz. However, after the ceasefire in Lebanon was not implemented and the truce was not extended to Hezbollah and Israel, Iran suspended the agreement. Iran has set three conditions for vessel transit: Ships must be commercial (no military vessels) and not linked to hostile countries; they must use a route designated by Iran; and passage must be coordinated with Iranian forces – a management role CENTCOM had previously acknowledged for the IRGC. If the US naval blockade continues, it will be considered a ceasefire violation and the strait will be closed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇬🇧🇫🇷🇮🇷英国首相斯塔默对霍尔木兹海峡重新向商船开放表示欢迎。他补充说，今天英国和法国宣布了他们与国际伙伴共同确保海峡航行自由的计划……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 法尔斯通讯社：一位接近谈判的知情人士透露，根据为期两周的停火协议，伊朗同意允许每天一定数量的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。然而，在黎巴嫩停火未得到执行且停火协议未延伸至真主党和以色列后，伊朗暂停了该协议。伊朗为船只通行设定了三个条件：船只必须是商用船只（不得有军舰）且不得与敌对国家有关联；必须使用伊朗指定的航线；通行必须与伊朗军队协调——中央司令部此前已承认伊斯兰革命卫队在其中扮演的管理角色。如果美国海军封锁继续，将被视为违反停火协议，海峡将被关闭。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters : A U.S. navy advisory has warned that the threat posed by mines in parts of the Strait of Hormuz is not fully understood, and that ships should consider avoiding the area. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：一份美国海军公告警告称，霍尔木兹海峡部分地区的水雷威胁尚未完全查明，船只应考虑避开该区域。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Axios : U.S. President Trump told Axios that he expects a final deal with Iran to end the war “in a day or two”, with a meeting likely this weekend. “The Iranians want to meet. They want to make a deal,” he said. Under the emerging memorandum of understanding, the U.S. would release $20 billion in frozen Iranian funds in exchange for Iran giving up its enriched uranium stockpile and agreeing to a moratorium on enrichment. Iran would be allowed to keep research reactors for medical isotopes, but all nuclear facilities must be above ground; existing underground sites may not be used for nuclear purposes. Trump said he will not lift the naval blockade before a deal is reached, and stressed that the strait must be open for everyone. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Axios：美国总统特朗普告诉Axios，他预计与伊朗达成结束战争的最终协议将在“一两天内”完成，会谈可能在本周末进行。他说：“伊朗人想见面。他们想达成协议。” 根据正在形成的谅解备忘录，美国将解冻200亿美元的伊朗资金，以换取伊朗放弃其浓缩铀库存并同意暂停浓缩活动。伊朗将被允许保留用于医疗同位素的研究堆，但所有核设施必须位于地面以上；现有的地下设施不得用于核目的。特朗普表示，在达成协议之前，他不会解除海军封锁，并强调海峡必须对所有人开放。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Lebanese army commander Radolf Haykal has released a statement on the reckless shooting in Dahieh: We will pursue those who fire weapons, arrest them, and refer them to the appropriate judicial authorities. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Lebanese Army has released a statement following yesterdays reckless celebratory shooting: The arrest of 9 individuals in Dahieh for firing gunshots into the air at night, with efforts ongoing to pursue the remaining suspects involved. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇱🇧 黎巴嫩军队指挥官拉多尔夫·海卡尔就达希耶的鲁莽枪击事件发表声明：我们将追捕那些开枪的人，逮捕他们，并将他们移交至适当的司法机关。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩军队在昨天的鲁莽庆祝性枪击事件后发表声明：在达希耶逮捕了9名在夜间向空中开枪的个人，目前正在努力追捕其余涉案嫌疑人。 @wfwitness
